reviews.review_description: I just installed the game super excited then after loading 2 staff members kept throwing me until this weird room every time I respawned, one of their names were James I think, playing the game wasn't a option I asked them to stop and they didn't, couldn't even leave the code if there was a way to leave since they kept grabbing me every time I joined. Please fix this 0/10 I might try again of I can get a response and I'll give the names of the staff next time please fix this terrible issuse

developer_response.body:
Hi navy_stick, thank you for taking the time to leave this review and we are truly sorry to hear about your experience. The behaviour you described is completely unacceptable and falls far below the standards we hold our staff to.

We want you to know that we have looked into this matter and as a result, the moderator involved has been demoted. We do not tolerate any form of abuse or misuse of staff privileges towards our players.

We genuinely hope you'll consider giving the game another chance, and we'd love for you to reach out to us directly with the names of those involved so we can ensure this doesn't happen again. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, feedback like yours helps us make the game a better and safer experience for everyone.

reviews.review_title: This game won’t let me play
reviews.review_description:
THIS GAME WONT LET ME JOIN!! How do I fix it? My arms are just on the floor like I don’t even have my controllers on my hand and then after five seconds the game just kicked me or my screen goes black and I just have to reset my game. This game is 100% a one star.
Unless it gets fixed

I saw the game on YouTube and I tried playing it on my quest￼ 3s but when I joined a public lobby, the screen was flashing like crazy. I couldn’t even play the game. I had to play the game, not in a server

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for giving our game a try and we're so sorry your experience wasn't what you were hoping for! The screen flashing issue you've described is something we're aware of and can confirm it is being caused by a recent Meta platform update rather than the game itself. We'd encourage you to contact Meta Support directly for assistance. We're really sorry for the frustration this has caused and hope you get the chance to enjoy the game properly once this is sorted!

reviews.review_description: When I got this game i was so scared cause of how the theme of it and the monsters creep me out and with my friend in a private server its way scarier cause its just me and my friend the maps are very cool and looks so detailed i play this game every day now so this is my new favorite game and I highly recommend this game to people who like to be scared.

I love this game and it's super fun, But the hit box for the monsters are very big and you can get caught insanely easily even with good jukes. Also, my first time loading into the game it completely crashed my headset like 3 times. It doesn't do it now, But it was really tough loading in the first time because I had to turn off and turn back on my headset a bunch of times to merely load in. Otherwise, it's fun, and the other people playing are pretty nice and aren't really toxic as games like scary baboon and gorrila tag.

This made me really happy to see this game because there was this one lethal ape game that I used to play (by xera games llc I think that was the name but anyways it got turned into a copy of primal fear and now owned by this random dude) but this game was exactly like the one I used to play but except it has some new cool monsters that I like. anyways really fun game dev and thanks for adding a monster room because literally half the lethal ape games I play has no monster room.                

10/10

It actually good in terms of scariness and isn’t just dark room spam —Ahem, Big Scary— and doesn’t just give you a small jump, it actually makes you scream, the map design is amazing, and I like to think of this as the best horror g-tag like game, I’ve been trying to find a game scarier than this, and I just can’t —Scary Baboon is just a copy of Lethal Ape anyways— and I give it kudos to this game because of it. Good job.

Im in 3s and always that i join the screen flashes like crazy and I not the only one that happens that

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you so much for your feedback and we're really sorry to hear you're experiencing this! We've looked into this and can confirm the black screen flickering is not caused by our game itself — it appears to be the result of a recent Meta platform update affecting some Quest 3S users. We'd recommend reaching out to Meta Support directly as this is unfortunately outside of our control as a developer. We really appreciate your patience and hope this gets resolved for you soon!
